title: [App] Flamingo - Connect headset already paired with charge case
scenario: Connect a pre-paired headset to the app and verify battery indicators and software update info display correctly.
steps: Connect a headset that is already paired with the charge case.
expected: 1) Headset appears properly, two battery indicators (headset and case) visible on home screen. 2) Update all button is present (if DFU available), info about headset and charge case is displayed.
